held_out_queries: Does Mind only publish analytic philosophy, or also continental / history-of-philosophy? Any school excluded?
How competitive is Mind — how many submissions, acceptance rate or time to decision?
Submission fee, and the difference between a book review and a critical notice?

edits.summary: Add the verified scope policy (quality is the sole criterion; no area/style/school of philosophy excluded), the >800-submissions/year volume, the book-review-vs-critical-notice distinction, and the triple-anonymous review wording; firm 'no submission fee stated' to the verified 'no submission fee' + OA-for-a-charge (APC/Read&Publish 需复读). Acceptance rate / decision time left as live-check (not published).
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 57 -> 99; de-hedged a verified fee fact; unpublished metrics correctly deferred
